Package net.boricj.bft.omf.records

Class OmfRecordExtdef

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.OmfRecord
net.boricj.bft.omf.records.OmfRecordExtdef
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<OmfSubrecordExtdef>, Collection<OmfSubrecordExtdef>, List<OmfSubrecordExtdef>, SequencedCollection<OmfSubrecordExtdef>, IndirectList<OmfSubrecordExtdef>, StreamWritable
public class OmfRecordExtdef extends OmfRecord implements IndirectList<OmfSubrecordExtdef>
EXTDEF - External Names Definition Record Defines external symbols referenced by the module.
